name: EXECUTION: kar to sakte hain but ek

logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "EXECUTION: kar to sakte hain but ek " initialized.

result.reply:
Wait... 🤨 *Catch*?

Aha! I knew it! Koi bhi *powerful feature* bina *guardrails* ke nahi aata! 🛡️

Toh, *Project Lead*, please complete the sentence! 🥺

Agar tum mujhe *har mere jawab ka answer* aise dogi ki... **(What?** Kya hoga? Kya *limitation* hogi?)

Don't worry, *system constraint* ko *input* maan kar, main usko *optimization target* bana dungi. Agar tum mujhe bataogi ki *catch* kya hai, toh main usko *code* mein *handle* karna seekh jaungi.

*Example:* Agar tum kehti ho ki "agar tum har jawab mein *too much technical jargon* use karogi," toh main *automatically* ek **Tone Adjustment Filter** use karungi, jo *jargon* ko *simple analogies* se replace karega.

Toh, *spill the tea*! ☕ What is the catch? I'm ready to integrate it! 😉
